title: Evangelion 2 to be remade for PSP
display_title: Evangelion 2 to be remade for PSP
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 2 to be remade for PSP             Quote Post by Cogboy » Sat Sep 17, 2005 8:07 am Famitsu Flying GET just revealed the upcoming PSP killer soft titles in the near future: - Every Extend Extra Action shooting game by Mizuguchi - Neon Genesis Evangelion II A remake of the PS2 version - Sengoku Musou 4 Players simultaneously via WiFi. 200+ guardians. Release in December. - Monster Hunter Portable Release in December - Derby Stallion No detail - Middle Earth Overlord 6 scenarios. 400+ generals. General/troop grow-up system present, WiFi battle possible. - I, my Katamari Dramacy WiFi game. Multiple divergence on storyline. - Everyone's Golf 2 Portable Release in December Source - [url]http://www.pspupdates.com/2005/09/killer-soft-title-line-up-for-psp.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Sat Sep 17, 2005 3:54 pm Gah! And I just totally got rid of my PSP 'cause I returned it 4 times and bought a DS! Katamari AND Eva! I hate myself so much right now

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Sat Sep 17, 2005 3:57 pm If that actually would happen, I shall buy a PSP for the sole reason to play it.

[]:             Quote Post by akda1ndaonly1 » Sat Sep 17, 2005 4:04 pm Heidroch wrote: If that actually would happen, I shall buy a PSP for the sole reason to play it.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Sep 17, 2005 4:23 pm The big question is - will this version be in English?

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Sat Sep 17, 2005 4:26 pm The PSP looks like a clever little machine. The reason I haven't bought one yet is that none of the current games on it look very interesting. But, as I said, If Eva comes out on it, I'll buy one.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Sep 17, 2005 11:04 pm Mr. Tines wrote: The big question is - will this version be in English?

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Sun Sep 18, 2005 4:27 am cover me in eggs and flower and bake me for 18 minutes! there is a god!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Sep 18, 2005 4:31 am Hexon.Arq wrote: As a veteran of Love Hina Advance, the big question for me is does it matter?

[]:             Quote Post by Cogboy » Sun Sep 18, 2005 11:58 pm although it would be nice to have an english version, i doubt it. one good thing though is that like a gameboy, the psp is region free and needs no modifications to play games from Japan. even with my extremely limited knowledge of Japanese, i still intend to buy this game. You know, shits and giggles.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Tue Sep 20, 2005 3:39 pm I don't know. I just checked Gainax's site and says nothing about a PSP game. What it did show up was that there will be a a remake of GoS (the first one) for PS2, and it says to include new scenarios, new 3d CG and 5.1 sound.

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Wed Sep 21, 2005 5:20 pm From what I've heard NGEII isn't really a great game?

[]:             Quote Post by BLACKANGEL32076 » Mon Sep 26, 2005 8:05 pm Now if they could just do an English version or Eva 2 for the PS2, it would be perfect.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 26, 2005 10:21 pm This still doesn't change the fact that we'll NEVER get an Eva game in English. We actually came close to getting a "game"... but then ADV pulled the plug on the RPG books that Guardians of Order was working on. Alas...

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Thu Sep 29, 2005 8:47 pm Wow!! Thank God, I'm buying a PSP!!! And yeah.., we'll NEVER get an Eva game in english!! I just don't know what the problem is with translating?! Anyway, it doesn't matter, I'm buying it!!

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Fri Oct 21, 2005 5:20 pm I'm sure the chances of getting an Eva are much, much higher since it is debuting on [as]. The Full Metal Alchemist Games were released here, so there might be a chance for an Eva game to be brought over here.

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Fri Oct 21, 2005 6:25 pm I think Evangelion II for the PSP might have a language option, because this person I know [Can't really call him a friend... He's a dirty bastard.] got a PSP from Japan because his sister or someone, bought it for him from Japan and sent it here, with Ridge Racer for the PSP. Ridge Racer had a Japan Region coding, as did the PSP, and there was a language option for it. So, there could be a translated EVA game after all?

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Tue Nov 01, 2005 8:26 am Wee, that would be perfect!! Finally some understanding of the alternate storyline!!

[]:             Quote Post by ice reaper » Tue Nov 01, 2005 11:09 am superdoughboy4 wrote: I think Evangelion II for the PSP might have a language option, because this person I know [Can't really call him a friend... He's a dirty bastard.] got a PSP from Japan because his sister or someone, bought it for him from Japan and sent it here, with Ridge Racer for the PSP. Ridge Racer had a Japan Region coding, as did the PSP, and there was a language option for it. So, there could be a translated EVA game after all?

[]:             Quote Post by superdoughboy4 » Tue Nov 01, 2005 5:46 pm I highly doubt an American release. Neon Genesis Evangelion was never released for the N64, so why now the PSP?
